name: chatgpt-markdown-downloader
description: Chrome extension for downloading ChatGPT conversations as Markdown.

scripts.check: node --check src/background.js && node --check src/markdown.js && node --check src/content.js && node --check src/popup.js && node --check tests/e2e/helpers.js && node --check tests/e2e/fixture.spec.js && node --check tests/e2e/live-chatgpt.spec.js
